ham.subject: Jira Ticket #12345 Resolved – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the Jira issue [ABC-987] has been resolved and merged into the main branch. The PR was reviewed and approved by @devops. Please pull the latest changes and run the integration tests.

Thanks,
John Doe
Software Engineer

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet and have temporarily suspended it to protect your assets. To restore access, please verify your identity by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to complete verification within 24 hours may result in permanent lockout and loss of funds.

Regards,
Security Team
